## Security / privacy checklist

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or real private URLs in commits
- [ ] No user media (images/video bytes) in logs, fixtures, or screenshots
- [ ] If logging/reporting changed: no sensitive data in new output
- [ ] If touching a **preset** (e.g. sensitive): [docs/presets/sensitive-media-review.md](../docs/presets/sensitive-media-review.md) constraints respected

**Preset (if any):** e.g. `none` / `sensitive-content-review`


## Screenshots / logs

- **Do not** attach real personal media. Synthetic or redacted only.
